transcript: Speaker A: 1 year nunchi english nerchukovadaniki try chesthunav. Kani basic english nerchukolekapothunav. And Aa app tho enti niku use. Nenu english nerchukovadaniki playstore lo chala apps use chesanu. Kani last lo namakam vachindhi speak X app medha. Endhulo unde AI teacher mana books lo unde kashatamaina english kakunda Normal daily life lo use chese Simple english thone nerpisthundhi. Dhini use chesi 1 week lo manchi english Nerchukovachu and 1month lo perfect english matladochu. E app yentha simple ante Nene kadhu natho pattu Use chesthu 1week lo perfect english nerchukuntunaru. Inka late endhuku Aani apps ni vadhilesi Perfect english nerchukovalante Mana speak X app ni download chesukondi. [Speaker A: You've been trying to learn English for a year but can't even learn basic English. What's the use of other apps? I tried many apps on the Play Store but finally trusted Speak X. Its AI teacher teaches simple, daily-life English instead of difficult textbook language. You can learn good English in 1 week and speak perfectly in 1 month. It is so simple that millions of others are also learning successfully. Stop wasting time and download the Speak X app now.]
on_screen_text:
1year nunchi english nerchukovadaniki try chesthunav [You've been trying to learn English for 1 year]
Kani basic english nerchukolekapothunav [But you can't learn basic English]
And Aa app tho enti niku use [And what is the use of that app to you]
Nenu english nerchukovadaniki playstore lo chala apps use chesanu [I used many apps in the playstore to learn English]
Kani last lo namakam vachindhi speak X app medha [But in the end, I got trust in the Speak X app]
Endhulo unde AI teacher [The AI teacher in this]
Mana books lo unde kashatamaina english kakunda [Instead of the difficult English in our books]
Normal daily life lo use chese [Used in normal daily life]
Simple english thone nerpisthundhi [Teaches with simple English]
Dhini use chesi 1week lo manchi english [Using this, good English in 1 week]
Nerchukovachu and 1month lo perfect english matladochu [Can be learned and in 1 month you can speak perfect English]
E app yentha simple ante [This app is so simple that]
Nene kadhu natho pattu [Not just me, along with me]
Use chesthu 1week lo perfect english nerchukuntunaru [Using it, they are learning perfect English in 1 week]
Inka late endhuku [Why delay anymore]
Aani apps ni vadhilesi [Leave all apps]
Perfect english nerchukovalante [If you want to learn perfect English]
Mana speak X app ni download chesukondi [Download our Speak X app]
summary: The presenter explains how she struggled to learn English until she discovered Speak X. She praises the app's AI teacher for using simple, practical language and claims millions of users have achieved fluency quickly. The video ends with a call to action to download the Speak X app.
